v175_summary.reason: Layer-balanced shell selection did not solve front/back occupancy and weakened the strongest V173 scores.

root_cause: Front/back occupancy is not explicitly learned or selected; multi-layer and thickness can improve while the thin-axis extreme layers remain weak or control-dominated.
required_next: budget sampler that preserves front and back layers per part
in-batch same-topology and shuffled separation with 0013_01 focus
visual checkpoint selection using full-scene and turntable boards
allowed_face_claim: head/face contour and hair region only
